snippet: The Victorian School Building Authority (VSBA) encourages schools to make independent financial decisions for construction works or services that are in the best interests of students and the school community. However, the VSBA must ensure that all school financial decisions are consistent with relevant policy, regulations and legislation. Correctly executed procurement of public construction works or services valued between $5,000 and $150,000 (including GST) ensure the Department of Education fulfils its mandatory obligations under the Project Development and Construction Management Act 1994 (Vic) External Link (PDCMA) and the Ministerial Directions and Instructions for Public Construction Procurement External Link .
